reviews.comment:
Se juntan muchos autos y los empleados hacen malabares. Hoy uno me sacó del apuro porque tenia las cubiertas a 25 y le pedi si me podia ayudar a inflarlas porque estoy operado y no tuvo ningun problema en hacerlo. Gracias

(Translated by Google)
There are a lot of cars lined up and the employees are doing a lot of work. Today one of them saved me because my tires were at 25 and I asked him if he could help me inflate them since I've had surgery, and he had no problem doing it. Thanks
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhenBIMkp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Esta a metros de la rotonda de entrada a Santa Clara del mar. Tiene una cafetería mínima con café para tomarlo ahí o llevarlo. Los empleados son muy amables, el problema es que cuando lo pedis para take away la tapa del vaso ajustaba mal y a pesar que lo tomamos con mucho cuidado cuando bebias el café con la tapa, indefectiblemente manchaba tu ropa sino que te quemabas. El café no lo venden barato, podrían comprar vasos térmico de mejor calidad, donde la tapa cierre bien

(Translated by Google)
It's located a few meters from the entrance roundabout to Santa Clara del Mar. It has a small cafeteria with coffee you can drink there or take away. The employees are very friendly. The problem is that when you order takeaway, the cup lid doesn't fit properly, and even though we were very careful when drinking the coffee with the lid on, it inevitably stains your clothes and even burns you. The coffee isn't sold cheaply; they could buy better-quality thermal cups with a tight-fitting lid.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhanNPQm5RRRAB
